recommendations.title: Cruel Jaws
recommendations.overview: A tiger shark bred by the Navy as a killing machine is wreaking havoc in the sleepy tourist town of Hampton Bay.

recommendations.title: Abbott and Costello Meet the Mummy
recommendations.overview: Stranded in Egypt, Bud and Lou find themselves in the buried tomb of a living mummy.

recommendations.title: Hocus Pocus 2
recommendations.overview: 29 years since the Black Flame Candle was last lit, the 17th-century Sanderson sisters are resurrected, and they are looking for revenge. Now it's up to three high school students to stop the ravenous witches from wreaking a new kind of havoc on Sale

recommendations.title: The Jack in the Box: Awakening
recommendations.overview: When a vintage Jack-in-the-box is opened by a dying woman, she enters into a deal with the demon within that would see her illness cured in return for helping it claim six innocent victims.

recommendations.title: Dark Shadows
recommendations.overview: Vampire Barnabas Collins is inadvertently freed from his tomb and emerges into the very changed world of 1972. He returns to Collinwood Manor to find that his once-grand estate and family have fallen into ruin.

recommendations.title: Dark Harvest
recommendations.overview: In a small Midwestern town, a deadly annual ritual unfolds when the mythical nightmare, Sawtooth Jack, rises from the cornfields and challenges the town’s teenage boys in a bloody battle of survival.

recommendations.title: Troll
recommendations.overview: When an explosion in the Norwegian mountains awakens an ancient troll, officials appoint a fearless paleontologist to stop it from wreaking deadly havoc.

recommendations.title: The Crow: City of Angels
recommendations.overview: A murder victim is brought back to life by a mysterious crow. With the help of a beautiful woman, he exacts revenge on his killers – only to realize his enemy has discovered the one weakness that can destroy him forever.

recommendations.title: Diana: In Her Own Words
recommendations.overview: Using home videos recorded by her voice coach, Diana takes us through the story of her life.

recommendations.title: The Mummy's Hand
